Animated adult male with brown skin, a thick black beard, and a prominent nose. He has a sturdy build.

scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: English बोलने में अटकते हो? Supernova के साथ रोज़ practice करो। [Do you hesitate while speaking English? Practice daily with Supernova.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by addressing a common pain point (hesitation in speaking English).
- Introduces Supernova as the daily practice solution.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone right from the start.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
आप क्या सीखना चाहते हैं? [What would you like to learn?]
Spoken English
Interview Prep
Office English
Daily Conversations
Grammar
CONTINUE

scenes.supernova_script:
Narrator says: रटने की ज़रूरत नहीं, असल ज़िंदगी की situations से सीखो। [No need to memorize, learn from real-life situations.]
Character B says: Thank you for helping our elderly neighbors. [Thank you for helping our elderly neighbors.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the practical, real-world learning approach of the app.
- Demonstrates the interactive listening exercise.
- Shows that making mistakes is part of the normal learning journey.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
सुनकर सही शब्द चुनें [Listen and choose the right words]
you
helping
Thank
awesome
attitude
neighbors
for
positive
elderly
somehow
our
CONTINUE
Incorrect
सही जवाब: [Correct Answer:]
Thank you for helping our elderly neighbors!
GOT IT

scenes.supernova_script:
Narrator says: Job interview हो या office meeting, अब बिना डरे English बोलो। गलतियों से डरो मत, हम सिखाएंगे। [Whether it's a job interview or an office meeting, speak English without fear now. Don't fear mistakes, we will teach you.]
Character C says: Basically, we're looking for a person who is very organized and knows about contracts. Do you have much experience with contracts, Amy? [Basically, we're looking for a person who is very organized and knows about contracts. Do you have much experience with contracts, Amy?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Connects the app's exercises to high-stakes real-world scenarios like job interviews.
- Reassures the user that making mistakes is okay, reinforcing the 'older sibling' brand voice.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
कोशिश करते रहें! [Keep trying!]
सुनें और सही जवाब दें [Listen and respond]
Amy is...
checking in to a hotel
at a job interview
being arrested
CONTINUE
Incorrect
सही जवाब: [Correct Answer:]
at a job interview
GOT IT

scenes.supernova_script: Narrator says: आज ही Supernova app डाउनलोड करो और confidence के साथ English बोलना शुरू करो! [Download the Supernova app today and start speaking English with confidence!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, encouraging call to action.
- Emphasizes the core emotional payoff: speaking with confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Confidence के साथ English बोलना सीखें [Learn to speak English with confidence]
Supernova
Download the spoken English app for India.
Download on the App Store
GET IT ON Google Play
